# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: DSA Practice Gets a Personal AI Assistant at Sign‑In
- Summary: Showcase the new Google authentication integration with Azure OpenAI AI assistant that guides users during problem solving, tying sign-in flow to AI help.
- Slug: codegrind-dsai-assisted-identity-login
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-dsai-assisted-identity-login
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-06-02-codegrind-dsai-assisted-identity-login.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind now pairs seamless Google sign-in with an AI assistant that helps you approach problems as you log in, easing onboarding and providing real-time, model-assisted guidance during practice sessions.
- CTA: Try CodeGrind with Google sign-in and ask the AI assistant for a quick hint on your next problem.
- Visual brief: A short 15–20s demo video showing: 1) user selecting Google sign-in, 2) redirected to CodeGrind dashboard, 3) AI assistant panel appearing with a sample hint, 4) focus on a LeetCode-style problem and code editor with syntax highlighting. Include subtle cyberpunk UI accents and CodeGrind branding.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
